description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a dark, rectangular headboard and a thick, plush mattress. The bed is covered with a patterned comforter in shades of black, white, and gray, which drapes over the sides and foot of the bed, creating a voluminous appearance. Three pillows are neatly arranged against the headboard, and a long, white runner or sheet is laid across the center of the bed, adding a touch of contrast. The bed frame appears to be solid and low-profile, with the headboard providing the only visible structural support. The overall look is contemporary and inviting, suitable for a stylish urban bedroom or loft. The bedding's geometric pattern and monochrome palette give the bed a sophisticated, city-inspired aesthetic.
description: A modern double bed with a dark headboard, geometric-patterned comforter in black, white, and gray, and a white runner across the center. Three pillows rest against the headboard, and the bed exudes a contemporary urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headboard, three pillows, and the full patterned comforter draping over the sides.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the mattress, the white runner, and the layered bedding.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the headboard and the back of the pillows, with the comforter visible at the foot.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, showing the headboard, pillows, and the draped comforter from the other side.
